---
title: "Home"
site: workflowr::wflow_site
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

Welcome to my research website.

This site contains SuSiE-RSS and mvSuSiE fine-mapping analyses for DMFS, Nteeth, and DFSS.

[View the full fine-mapping analysis](run_susier.html)
